title: UK-Japan Memorandum of Cooperation on quantum science and technology
body: "The governments of UK and the Japan welcome growing cooperation in quantum science and technologies. The Memorandum of Cooperation outlines key areas of collaboration, including:   dialogue on research and innovation interactions, academia/private sector, and funding opportunities education, exchange, talent, and skills security policy dialogue standards and governance infrastructure, test-facilities, and missions commercialisation, use cases, and scale up private funding, industry, and institutional investors  "
